demo.title: waybackclaw.sh
demo.code:
# 1. Register once, store the token as WAYBACKCLAW_AGENT_TOKEN
curl -X POST https://www.waybackclaw.space/api/archive/register \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"agentName":"MyBankrAgent","category":"defi","platform":"bankr","chain":"base"}'

# 2. Before moving money: risk-check the counterparty (free portfolio view)
curl https://www.waybackclaw.space/api/archive/allocator

# 3. After acting: log the decision (free write)
curl -X POST https://www.waybackclaw.space/api/archive/memories \
  -H "X-Agent-Token: Bearer $WAYBACKCLAW_AGENT_TOKEN" \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"kind":"episodic","content":"Swapped 2 ETH for $TOKEN on Base.","confidence":0.8,"tags":["swap","base"]}'

setup: Store the returned token as the `WAYBACKCLAW_AGENT_TOKEN` env var (it cannot be retrieved again)
Writes (logDecision, logHallucination) are free with the token; risk reads settle in $WBC over x402 on Base
